title: Intensely Roasted Ukrainian Toor Dal Bake
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Ukrainian dish featuring roasted toor dal, this bake is crispy on the outside and flavorful on the inside, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, rinse the toor dal and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Drain and rinse the toor dal, then set it aside.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent.
Add the chopped carrot and potato to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked vegetable mixture, toor dal, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with sour cream.
Bake the mixture in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until it is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
